# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/piotr/Documents/Life/people/me/split_keyboard/zmk-config-totem
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Application Binary Directory

//Application Source Directory
APPLICATION_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=/home/piotr/Documents/Life/people/me/split_keyboard/zmk/app

//Path to a file.
BOARD_DIR:PATH=BOARD_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Selected user ZMK config
CACHED_ZMK_CONFIG:STRING=/home/piotr/Documents/Life/people/me/split_keyboard/zmk-config-totem

//Path to a program.
CCACHE_FOUND:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ccache

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/piotr/Documents/Life/people/me/split_keyboard/zmk-config-totem/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
SHIELD:UNINITIALIZED=totem_left

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
WEST_PYTHON:UNINITIALIZED=/home/piotr/Documents/Life/people/me/split_keyboard/zmk/.venv/bin/python3.12

//Zephyr base
ZEPHYR_BASE:PATH=/home/piotr/Documents/Life/people/me/split_keyboard/zmk/zephyr

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
ZMK_CONFIG:UNINITIALIZED=/home/piotr/Documents/Life/people/me/split_keyboard/zmk-config-totem

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for ZephyrAppConfiguration.
ZephyrAppConfiguration_DIR:PATH=ZephyrAppConfiguration_DIR-NOTFOUND

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for ZephyrBuildConfiguration.

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Zephyr.

CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=28
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Path to CMake executable.
CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cmake
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cpack
//Path to ctest program executable.

//Name of generator.
CMAKE_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=Ninja
//Generator instance identifier.

//Name of generator platform.
